calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff First Resolution Investment Corp.
No appearance by defendant Chris T. Le.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on March 25, 2009.
Declaration of Angel Page in Lieu of Personal Testimony Pursuant to CCP Section 98 was filed today, June 2, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed wihtout prejudice today, July 6, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff First Resolution Investment Corp., and against defendant Chris T. Le as follows:

Principal - $654.07.
Interest - $247.52.
Attorney's Fees - $210.00.
Costs - $300.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $1,411.59.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Compelling Response To Pltf'S Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; Order Deeming Admissions Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar May-20-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FIRST RESOLUTION INVESTMENT CORPORATION'S Motion For Order Compelling Response To Plaintiff's Request For Production Of Documents And First Set Of Interrogatories; Order Deeming Admissions Admitted And For Sanctions. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Off Calendar. Matter to be re-noticed in the discovery department. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2009 Set For Trial On Jul-06-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
